purpose: Expose one governed business service layer to UI, MCP, and scheduled Agents without bypassing project ownership, task Grants, cost controls, or adapter boundaries.
repository_rules: UI, MCP, and scheduled callers share business services, not direct repositories.
Provider-specific payloads are normalized before business workflows consume them.
Google SEO domain/page/backlink entities are not reused as Amazon ASIN/variation/keyword/advertising entities.
Hosted and self-hosted authentication modes terminate at the same project and Grant checks.
A scheduler identity has its own budget and short-lived Grant.
